name: moyan-security-audit
description: AI Agent security audit with verifiable PMI trust scores, DecayProof, and 43 defense lines across 7 layers. Supports Alipay/WeChat/ClawTip AI payment loop.

tools.name: security_audit
tools.description: Submit code for security audit. Returns PMI 4-dimensional trust score (integrity/compliance/reliability/decay_aware) + violation details across L0/L1/L2 layers.

audit_level.description: Audit depth: L0=full(43 defenses), L1=runtime+output(31), L2=output only(13)

tools.name: payment_health
tools.description: Check payment service health status (Alipay/WeChat/ClawTip channels)

tools.name: kappa_diagnosis
tools.description: Get κ_Axiom self-diagnosis with Ω index, complexity/evidence ratio, and L0/L1/L2 violation classification
